description: Changes the AI model based on the active backend (Ollama/Kobold).

commands.get_current_backend: Returns the AI backend currently in use (e.g., cloud, ollama, kobold).
commands.list_models: Lists all available models for the currently selected backend.
commands.set_model: Sets a new active AI model based on the numeric index obtained from list_models.

function.name: MODELS__get_current_backend
function.description: Returns the AI backend currently in use (e.g., cloud, ollama, kobold).

function.name: MODELS__list_models
function.description: Lists all available models for the currently selected backend.

function.name: MODELS__set_model
function.description: Sets a new active AI model based on the numeric index obtained from list_models.
